metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the splunk-expert plugin: 18 expert Splunk Enterprise and SC4S skills.

plugins.name: splunk-expert
plugins.description: Expert-level Splunk Enterprise skills covering SPL, conf file management, SC4S, CIM compliance, TA/app development, ITSI, SOAR, distributed architecture, deployment server, dashboards, ingestion pipeline design, the Splunk UI Toolkit, log triage, and Linux host tuning.
